headline: Jabil (JBL) Valuation Check After Strong Data Center Growth And Raised Guidance
summary: Recent commentary around Jabil (JBL) has focused on its data center exposure, with the intelligent infrastructure segment reporting 52% year over year revenue growth and the company lifting full year guidance. See our latest analysis for Jabil. The data center story is feeding directly into the share price, with Jabil’s 30-day share price return of 11.39% and 90-day share price return of 20.19% adding to a very large 5-year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has been building...
